title: Scripts and tile paint
description: Export Juni handlers for entity scripts, then paint a tilemap in the scene view.

steps.caption: Export a Juni handler
steps.narration: In your entry module, write export fn player_on_update with entity_id and dt parameters. The compiler emits that name as a WASM export, same as main and frame.

steps.caption: Bind Script in Inspector
steps.narration: Select an entity. Enable Script, set Module to player and Handler to on_update. Save Scene. On Play, world_step calls your Juni export — no JavaScript registerScriptHandler required.

steps.caption: Enable a tilemap
steps.narration: Create or select an entity with Transform2D. Enable Tilemap in the Inspector. Set cols, rows, tile size, and brush tile. The tiles array round-trips into your .jscene file.

steps.caption: Paint in the scene
steps.narration: With the tilemap selected, click cells to paint. Alt or right-click erases. Hold Command or Control and drag to move the whole map. Save Scene, reload, and the tiles match.
